name: Monkey.D.Dragon (Reprint)
effect_text: [Rush](This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)[On Play] Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
